title: Shared Security Evidence Artifact
description: Common evidence artifact schema for evaluation, dashboard, and website consumption.

control_name.description: Name of the control that produced or informed the evidence decision.

threat_type.description: Threat category tied to the evidence event (for example prompt_injection or data_exfiltration).

stage.description: Pipeline stage where the evidence event was evaluated.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the decision evidence was recorded.

request_id.description: Traceable request identifier used for cross-plane correlation.

severity.description: Severity associated with the evidence decision.

event_type.description: Normalized event classification for dashboard ingestion.
